title: Is an online will legally valid? Here's what families should know
summary: A will prepared using an online platform is legally valid in India if it meets statutory requirements. But families should ensure it reflects the testator's specific circumstances and assets.

title: What are multi-asset allocation funds? Comparing the top 5 funds by portfolio allocation
summary: Multi-asset allocation funds provide diversification by investing across at least three asset classes, helping reduce dependence on any single investment. However, each fund follows a different portfolio allocation strategy, resulting in varying levels of risk and return potential.

title: RSU paradox: when your biggest wealth creator becomes a concentration risk
summary: RSUs can be powerful wealth creators, but holding on to every vested share ties your career and investments to the same company, creating a concentration risk many employees overlook.

title: Changing jobs soon? Fix these EPF transfer errors before resigning for a smooth PF transfer
summary: Avoid costly PF transfer delays before changing jobs. Checking your EPF transfer records, UAN, KYC and employment details before resigning can prevent processing issues and help ensure your provident fund balance moves smoothly to your new employer.

title: Why your used-car loan costs more than you think
summary: Used-car financing now drives nearly 60% of platform transactions, but loans carry steeper rates (9-18%) and hidden costs like GPS-device fees and hypothecation charges versus new-car loans.&nbsp;

title: Salary isn't everything for Gen Z, 50% prioritize work-life balance while evaluating job offers: Naukri report
summary: Gen Z professionals in India are increasingly prioritizing work-life balance and skill development over promotions and salary hikes, according to Naukri’s Gen Z Work Code report. 14% of Gen Z employees may quit within a year if growth is missing, compared to 3% of millennials.
